summary: Comprehensive testing completed for TruVant Automatic Image Branding feature. All backend APIs (11/11 tests) and frontend UI features working correctly. The feature automatically brands car images with TruVant Verified badge (top-left), circular logo watermark (bottom-right, 20% opacity), and premium gradient background.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview - Returns branded image as data URI (no auth required)
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview - Accessible without authentication
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview - Handles invalid URLs gracefully
Backend: POST /api/brand-image-preview - Supports custom branding options (opacity, badge, logo)
Backend: POST /api/brand-image - Requires authentication (returns 401/403 without token)
Backend: POST /api/brand-image - Returns branded image with auth token
Backend: POST /api/cars - Automatically brands main image on car creation
Backend: POST /api/cars - Automatically brands gallery images on car creation
Backend: POST /api/cars - Stores original_image and original_gallery URLs
Backend: PUT /api/cars/{car_id} - Automatically brands new image on car update
Backend: GET /api/cars - Returns cars with branded images (data URIs)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Add Car modal - Preview button visible next to Image URL input
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Add Car modal - Preview button generates branded preview
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Add Car modal - Loading spinner shown while branding
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Add Car modal - Toggle button switches between Original/Branded preview
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Add Car modal - Auto-Branding Enabled info box displayed
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Car creation with automatic branding works
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Success toast 'Car added with TruVant branding!' displayed
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Branded indicator badge shown on car images in inventory table
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Car deletion works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Image branding service (image_branding.py) correctly implements Pillow-based image processing with gradient background, badge, and watermark
API endpoints properly separate preview (no auth) from production branding (auth required)
Car creation/update endpoints correctly store both branded and original image URLs for reference
Frontend correctly implements preview generation with loading states and toggle functionality
Branded indicator badge uses Sparkles icon with 'Branded' text overlay on car thumbnails
seed_data_creation: Test car 'Toyota Fortuner Test' exists with branded image. Test cars created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TruVant Automatic Image Branding feature fully implemented and tested. Key components: 1) Backend service at /app/backend/services/image_branding.py handles Pillow-based image processing. 2) API endpoints: POST /api/brand-image-preview (no auth), POST /api/brand-image (auth required). 3) Car creation/update automatically brands images. 4) Frontend Add Car modal has Preview button, loading spinner, and Original/Branded toggle. 5) Inventory table shows 'Branded' badge on car thumbnails with data URI images.
